title: Nuage Vapour Shower Tablets - Breathe Easy with Every Shower | Contains Menthol & Eucalyptus Oil (3 Pack)
features: STEAM THERAPY: A quick shower with Nuage Vapour Shower Tablets can be the refreshing remedy needed to breathe easy.

INVIGORATING EUCALYPTUS OIL: Each shower steamer is infused with eucalyptus oil. Whether at home or on the go, this refreshing scent brings a spa-like atmosphere to any shower, promoting relaxation and clarity.

EASY TO USE: With straightforward instructions, these shower steamers are simple for anyone to enjoy. Just place a tablet under the water stream and watch as it fizzes away, releasing therapeutic vapours that transform the shower into a sanctuary.

RELAXING AROMATHERAPY EXPERIENCE: Menthol soothes the mind and provides relaxation. Enjoy a calming shower ritual that helps to melt away stress and tension, making it perfect for unwinding after a hectic day.

TRAVEL-FRIENDLY DESIGN: Each pack contains three tablets that are perfect for mini toiletries. Slip them into your travel bag for a refreshing shower experience while away from home, ensuring you always have your self-care essentials at hand.

NO RESIDUE, JUST RELAXATION: Unlike some bath products, these shower steamers leave no sticky residue behind. Enjoy a clean, refreshing shower without the hassle of clean-up, making every experience enjoyable and stress-free.

ENHANCES YOUR SELF-CARE ROUTINE: Ideal for anyone looking to elevate their self-care routine, Nuage Vapour Shower Tablets are a must-have. Experience the luxury of a spa day without ever leaving your home; just turn on the water and let the relaxation begin!

PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Whether preparing for a busy day or winding down in the evening, these tablets fit seamlessly into any routine. Their soothing properties make them ideal for everyday use or special occasions when extra care is needed.

GIFTS FOR UNIQUE CELEBRATIONS: Looking for a special gift? These vapour shower tablets are perfect for birthdays, holidays, or just because! Delight your loved ones with a thoughtful present that shows you care about their wellbeing.

MINI TOILETRIES MUST-HAVE: These shower steamers are not just a treat; they’re essential for anyone who values their health and wellness. Keep them handy for a quick pick-me-up whenever you need to alleviate stress and enjoy an invigorating shower experience.
description: Product Description Transform your shower into a rejuvenating oasis with Nuage Vapour Shower Tablets. These delightful shower steamers are crafted to help soothe and promote calm, allowing you to breathe easy. Infused with the invigorating scents of menthol and eucalyptus oil, each tablet provides an instant burst of freshness that can turn an ordinary shower into a spa-like experience. Whether you're feeling under the weather or just need a moment of relaxation, these steamers are perfect for anyone wanting a moment of serenity. Plus, with three convenient tablets in each pack, they make for fantastic gifts for women’s birthdays or any unique occasion. Using Nuage Vapour Shower Tablets is a breeze! Simply unwrap the packaging, place one tablet directly under the shower stream, and let the steam work its magic as it dissolves. The soothing vapours will fill your shower, helping you to de-stress and unwind. Perfect for those chilly mornings when your body feels tight, or for winding down after a long day, these tablets promise a blissful experience that refreshes both body and mind. Packaged conveniently, they also fit perfectly into travel size toiletries, making them an ideal companion for your next adventure. Ingredients Sodium Bicarbonate, Sodium Chloride, Sodium Carbonate, Citric Acid, Menthol, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Limonene. Directions Unwrap plastic packaging. Place directly under the shower stream and rinse until dissolved. Retain product pack for information. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
